name: strava
description: Reads the authenticated Strava athlete's profile, activities, lifetime stats, and clubs through the Strava v3 REST API.

risk.read: external Strava API read of the authenticated athlete's profile, activity, stats, and club data
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for strava (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url/refresh_token round-trip and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
